docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2018 -CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-28-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF 237 SHIPLEY, LLC REPRESENTED BY STEVE CHAN, MANAGER. DEFENDANT, JAD MUBAYED DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF HAS SUED DEFENDANT IN HIS INDIVIDUAL CAPACITY RATHER THAN DEFENDANT'S TOWING COMPANY WHICH IS THE ENTITY THAT APPEARS TO BE RESPONSIBLE FOR PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES ACCORDING TO THE EVIDENCE PLAINTIFF PRESENTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL AMEND ITS CLAIM TO NAME THE TOWING COMPANY AND SHALL SERVE ITS AMENDED CLAIM ON THE TOWING COMPANY PRIOR TO THE CONTINUED HEARING ON THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR BY STEVE CHAN (MGR.) ON BEHALF OF SHIPLEY LLC FILED BY PLAINTIFF 237 SHIPLEY, LLC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-11-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF 237 SHIPLEY, LLC. DEFENDANT JAD MUBAYED DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF MUST AMEND CLAIM. PLIANTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION RE: AMENDMENT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO REMOVE DEFENDANT JAD MUBAYED AND ADD IN DEFENDANT A&J AUTO BODY INC. FILED BY PLAINTIFF 237 SHIPLEY, LLC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF 237 SHIPLEY, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT MUBAYED, JAD
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY 237 SHIPLEY, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT A&J AUTO BODY & TOWING LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-23-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT A&J AUTO BODY & TOWING LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED OCT-15-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MUBAYED, JAD
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF 237 SHIPLEY, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT A&J AUTO BODY & TOWING LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF 237 SHIPLEY LLC REPRESENTED BY STEVE CHAN. DEFENDANT JAD MUBAYED (REMOVED) DID NOT APPEAR. DEFENDANT A & J AUTO BODY AND TOWING DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF 237 SHIPLEY, LLC REPRESENTED BY STEVE CHAN, MANAGER. DEFENDANT, JAD MUBAYED DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF 237 SHIPLEY, LLC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 237 SHIPLEY, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT A&J AUTO BODY & TOWING LLC $1,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,765.00, DEFENDANT A & J AUTO BODY AND TOWING LLC SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF 237 SHIPLEY, LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY 237 SHIPLEY, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT MUBAYED, JAD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF 237 SHIPLEY, LLC.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION - AMEND CLAIM SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
